claim: 60% of sea-level leaders cite inability to properly educate and upskill as their top barrier to AI adoption, making upskilling the missing layer in enterprise AI strategy despite high productivity expectations.
actionable: If deploying AI in enterprise, prioritize integrated hands-on learning platforms that reduce friction (authentication, environment setup, compute costs) rather than expecting employees to self-teach via docs and tutorials.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Phillip Snalune: AI Upskilling: A Framework Agnostic Playbook to Scale Adoption

claim: Friction-free learning requires pre-configured tooling for specific LLM/framework combinations (Claude Code, AWS, LangChain, HuggingFace) with single-sign-on and bundled compute rather than forcing learners to authenticate separately.
actionable: When building internal AI training programs, provide pre-configured environments accessible via SSO with compute budgets pre-allocated rather than requiring learners to set up tools or manage cloud accounts.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Phillip Snalune: AI Upskilling: A Framework Agnostic Playbook to Scale Adoption

claim: Large-scale studies show AI-assisted code tutoring (e.g., AI error correction) doubles completion rates and yields median 15% grade gains, validating AI as an effective learning tool.
actionable: Incorporate AI-assisted error correction and hint systems into technical learning platforms to improve learner engagement and outcomes.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Phillip Snalune: AI Upskilling: A Framework Agnostic Playbook to Scale Adoption

claim: AI upskilling must address both technical and non-technical audiences; the adoption imperative is organization-wide (processes, collaboration, outcomes) not just individual skill gaps.
actionable: Design AI upskilling programs for mixed technical and non-technical audiences with focus on cross-functional workflows and organizational outcomes rather than specializing by role.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Phillip Snalune: AI Upskilling: A Framework Agnostic Playbook to Scale Adoption
